use_cases: Container for displaying data visualizations like donut charts
Creating consistent card-based layouts in dashboards
Wrapping analytics widgets with standardized styling
Card component system for building UI layouts
Organizing mixed content with header, body, and footer sections
ai_summary: A flexible card component system providing Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter sub-components with standard shadcn/ui styling. Features rounded borders, subtle shadows, and consistent spacing designed to wrap data displays, charts, and mixed content. Optimized as a universal container for dashboard widgets and card-based interfaces.
